judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements of a line graph with the same title, axis labels, and scales, but Description B adds detail about the legend entries and a feature at the 350 nm mark that Description A omits, without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A line graph titled "Atlas IIAS" plotting "Percent Impacts in 10-nm Interval" (y-axis, logarithmic scale from 0.1 to 100) against "Impact Range (nm)" (x-axis, linear scale from 0 to 350). The graph displays four curves:
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A line graph titled “Atlas IIAS” showing “Percent Impacts in 10-nm Interval” versus “Impact Range (nm),” with four labeled curves: “Theoretical,” “Breakup q-alpha = 5,000 deg-lb/ft²,” “Breakup q-alpha = 20,000 deg-lb/ft²,” and “No Breakup”; caption below reads “Figure 22. Impact-Range Distributions.”*
